botcomponent.description: Assemble the end-of-quarter markdown review into a one-page, shareable PDF for the regional team. Use last, after sales-analysis-chart has produced the PNG charts and markdown-optimizer has produced the recommended discounts. The skill generates and runs Python (reportlab) that embeds the charts, a recommendation table, and notes into a PDF. It does not decide anything — it only renders already-confirmed results.
botcomponent.name: merch-report-pdf
